name: =?utf-8?Q?Inaugural=20Committee?=
subject: Explore Vermont Inaugural Gala
body:
Please join us! |
---
| |
---
|
---
| **Explore Vermont Gala begins at 7:30 p.m.**
Doors close at 9:00 p.m.
Gala concludes at 11:00 p.m.

**General admission tickets can be purchased online at[www.philscott.org](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3a1796c8e4&e=19cebfe173)**
VISA, MasterCard, Discover, American Express are accepted

**Or by check
Payable to: Barre Opera House
P.O. Box 583
Barre, VT 05641**
**General admission $50.00
_Proceeds will go to Vermont children's programs_**

* * *

**EXPLORE VERMONT GALA SPONSORSHIPS
Governor’s sponsorship reception begins at 6:30 p.m.**

**Platinum $5,000**
Recognition on Gala banner and in program
Two Reception and eight Gala tickets - reserved table
Eight donated Gala tickets to youth mentors and military personnel

**Gold $2,500**
Recognition on Gala banner and in program
Two Reception and four Gala tickets - open seating
Four donated Gala tickets to youth mentors and military personnel

**Silver $1,000**
Recognition in program
Two Reception and two Gala tickets - open seating
Two donated Gala tickets to youth mentors and military personnel

**Please make Sponsorship checks payable to: **
Vermonters United to Help, PO Box 52, Montpelier, VT 05601

**Questions? E-mail[ info@philscott.org](mailto:info@philscott.org)**
---
| | | **Lodging Accommodations**
A block of rooms has been reserved for Saturday, January 12, 2019. The special room rate will be available until January 7th or until the group block is sold-out, whichever comes first.

To reserve your room, click [here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=38b07e1b89&e=19cebfe173).
---
| Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=5a22d895c0)
---

name: Todd Cheewing
subject: Bylaw Submission Deadline EXTENSION
body:
Derek, Chairman MacDonald has approved an extension of the **bylaw submission deadline** for**the 2019 Annual Meeting** of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Please point your internet browser to [nh.gop/annual-meeting](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyA8k-2BIZnm58YrBenldRvKkMMMRiXxGvVazW9FwESu7XG_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M29SLsb0yoN3P8PpOO-2B8kNlFfYGBrGGZtukcXiygaibsxyof5bMPMCYbJeeyPZj0uUgCjVvPhafgnTURr2eFfEf6Yn0-2F1KSTk-2Bp5zSJepZuBVmHupeEmOcO32Nnts0OW1q-2FQYxJihCUsZzZt9NcRDxWqeGolO9n802SMvcDT-2FuPjBotaoJ1r3j0W-2BPpbInijx6M-2FFnVgL5zEakMOfxjz6lwH6ioKVG4e7tW1JmGO2HckNqR6TFQuWxZ9l2sahr77h3am48q18lbpiuNlWFxsKbg-3D-3D) for more information. A form to submit bylaw amendments is live on [this page](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyA8k-2BIZnm58YrBenldRvKkMMMRiXxGvVazW9FwESu7XG_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M29SLsb0yoN3P8PpOO-2B8kNlFfYGBrGGZtukcXiygaibsxyof5bMPMCYbJeeyPZj0uUgCjVvPhafgnTURr2eFfEXU6Hu7Ks7zETaa03tOLpyHN03NtJXKlZoV8IrOPNNSZxuwSnrVrAQW1-2BJ5WuFCrX0pJXpyu-2BAoN7C3KkyHIQX4HaxhDVimuMcrilRjjrvbneZmTYCRA3V3Sfka6mtWqUpZCn4F-2FiZ2VwtIB0ojLl0dHrCnxJjpLR4zN6117sGkt-2B05a4qQ6nsC1BNPUnPXR7Q-3D-3D). Submissions will now close **FRIDAY, JANUARY 4TH at 11:59 PM.** **** Todd Cheewing NHGOP Executive Director [ ](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyA8k-2BIZnm58YrBenldRvKkMMMRiXxGvVazW9FwESu7XG_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30M29SLsb0yoN3P8PpOO-2B8kNlFfYGBrGGZtukcXiygaibsxyof5bMPMCYbJeeyPZj0uUgCjVvPhafgnTURr2eFfEfrWE7pqbfN5a7cyA2Pb5mIGyeF-2BVLqse-2FeuerSu5BzUjccAct9VZoVuxLexgEXbbdcx-2By7Cs95epO-2FVs6XDF28x3lGv1PZseWXZzDFXVWyGElJu384OBMBxpXgQnqQAAOhUaycf5JTzgxB93pWewsQm2gGZg39frZqVPxxpSG5nBPuYKSlqZBLiM4wSmsDGog-3D-3D)

clean_body: Derek, Chairman MacDonald has approved an extension of the bylaw submission deadline forthe 2019 Annual Meeting of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Please point your internet browser to for more information. A form to submit bylaw amendments is live on . Submissions will now close FRIDAY, JANUARY 4TH at 11:59 PM. ** Todd Cheewing NHGOP Executive Director | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire * 03301
